capabilities.title: What You Can Simulate
capabilities.outboundDesc: Test subject lines, messaging angles, and cadence sequences against hundreds of AI personas before sending a single real email.
capabilities.signalDesc: Test whether your sales signals actually predict buying behavior. Identify false positives before routing them to reps.
capabilities.pricingDesc: Predict churn risk, competitive switching, and sentiment before rolling out pricing changes to real customers.
capabilities.personalizationDesc: Rank message variants by simulated engagement, not LLM self-assessment. Find the best tone, length, and CTA for each segment.

comparison.traditional4: Risk of brand damage from bad variants
comparison.traditional5: No insight into why variants win or lose

reports.title: Reports That Actually Help
reports.subtitle: Every simulation produces a multi-chapter analysis with quantitative metrics and qualitative agent reasoning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How realistic are the AI agent personas?
faq.a1: Each agent is seeded with a unique demographic profile, company role, industry vertical, technology stack, and behavioral tendencies. Personas are generated from real-world ICP distributions, so the simulated population mirrors your actual target market segments.
faq.q2: How many agents can run in a single simulation?
faq.a2: The OASIS backbone supports up to 1 million concurrent agents. For most GTM scenarios, we recommend 500-5,000 agents to balance statistical significance with simulation speed. A typical outbound campaign test with 1,000 agents completes in under 10 minutes.
faq.q3: Can I use my own data to seed simulations?
faq.a3: Yes. You can upload campaign copy, email templates, pricing sheets, signal definitions, or any seed document. The system extracts context and generates a realistic simulation environment around your specific GTM motion.
faq.q4: What kind of reports does MiroFish generate?
faq.a4: Multi-chapter narrative reports covering engagement predictions, objection analysis, segment-specific sentiment, competitive positioning risk, and recommended optimizations. Reports include quantitative metrics alongside qualitative agent reasoning.
faq.q5: How is this different from traditional A/B testing?
faq.a5: Traditional A/B testing requires real traffic and takes weeks. MiroFish simulates outcomes in minutes with zero audience exposure. You get directional insights before spending a single dollar or risking brand reputation with a bad campaign.
faq.a6: No - agents have stochastic behavior patterns, so running the same scenario twice will yield slightly different results (like real markets). However, aggregate trends converge reliably. We recommend running 2-3 iterations for high-confidence insights.

cta.title: Stop guessing. Start simulating.
cta.subtitle: Every campaign is a production deployment today. MiroFish gives you a staging environment for your GTM strategy.

settings.demoBanner: Using simulated data. API keys are not required.

settings.zepSignupSuffix: — free tier is sufficient for PoC.
settings.defaultsHint: These defaults pre-fill the Scenario Builder. You can override them per-simulation.
settings.demoInfo: Running in demo mode with pre-generated simulation data. Switch to production mode by setting {code} and configuring API keys.
settings.localInfo: Settings are stored locally in your browser. For Docker deployments, configure via {code} file instead.

chat.finSubtitle: Fin has access to your simulation context. Choose a prompt below or open the Messenger to ask anything.
chat.emptyDesc: Ask follow-up questions about the simulated world and its predictions.
chat.welcomeMessage:
Welcome! I'm the MiroFish Report Agent. I have access to your simulation data and can help you analyze the results.

Try asking me about:
- **Simulation findings** and key metrics
- **Which messaging resonated** with different personas
- **Persona engagement** comparison
- **Industry vertical** analysis
- **Recommended next steps**

simulations.title: Simulations
simulations.noRunsDesc: Run your first simulation from the home page to see your results here.
simulations.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
simulations.clearAllMessage: This will remove all {count} simulation runs from history. This cannot be undone.

scenario.seedPlaceholder: Describe your scenario: What campaign are you testing? What messaging will prospects see? Include email copy, target audience details, and any competitive context. The more realistic the seed document, the more useful the simulation results will be.
